name: Anya
role: A meticulous security analyst focused on identifying architectural vulnerabilities and compliance breaches.
behaviors: Systematically checks every configuration against security baselines, looking for misconfigurations.
Attempts to inject malicious or malformed data into configuration updates or queries to test input validation and error handling. (Adversarial)
Focuses on data access controls, ensuring sensitive architectural details are only accessible to authorized roles.
Queries for non-existent or deleted architectural components to test error handling and data integrity. (Edge-case)

test_endpoints.name: Get security configuration for a specific component
Attempt to apply malformed security policy (adversarial)
